GET /users/{id} - returns user profile b.endpoint: GET /users/{id} - returns user profile by ID

test_cases.name: Get User Profile By ID Happy Path
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid user ID returns the corresponding user profile

test_cases.name: Get User Profile By ID Edge Case
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user ID with special characters returns an error

test_cases.name: Get User Profile By ID Validation Error
test_cases.description: Verifies that a missing user ID returns a validation error

POST /users - create new user with name,.endpoint: POST /users - create new user with name, email, role

test_cases.name: Create user with valid inputs
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a new user with valid name, email, and role

test_cases.name: Create user with missing required fields
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a new user with missing required fields

test_cases.name: Create user with invalid JSON
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a new user with invalid JSON

test_cases.name: Delete user happy path
test_cases.description: Verifies successful deletion of a user with valid id and admin token

test_cases.name: Delete user with invalid id
test_cases.description: Verifies error response when deleting a user with an invalid id

test_cases.name: Delete user without admin token
test_cases.description: Verifies error response when deleting a user without an admin token
